Package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto

package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto
Data-transfer object (DTO) classes.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AcceptedStateDescriptionUpdateRequest
    Request body DTO for updating an AcceptedState description.
    IssueReportRequest
    Request body DTO for creating or updating an issue report.
    IssueReportStatusUpdateRequest
    Request body DTO for updating the accepted-state of an issue report.
    IssueReportSummary
    Summary DTO exposing a subset of IssueReport fields for list views.
    IssueReportTypesUpdateRequest
    Request body DTO for replacing the issue types associated with an issue report.
    ManagerIssueReportResponse
    Response DTO for GET /manager/issue-reports.
    ManagerIssueReportResponse.AcceptedStateResponse
    Nested DTO exposing a subset of AcceptedState fields for manager views.
    ManagerIssueReportResponse.IssueTypeResponse
    Nested DTO exposing a subset of IssueType fields for manager views.
    ManagerIssueReportResponse.ReportImageResponse
    Nested DTO exposing a subset of ReportImage fields for manager views.
    ManagerIssueReportResponse.ReportLocationResponse
    Nested DTO exposing a subset of ReportLocation fields for manager views.
    ManagerIssueReportResponse.UserProfileResponse
    Nested DTO exposing a subset of UserProfile fields for manager views.
    ManagerStatusUpdateRequest
    Request body DTO for updating manager status of a user.
    UpdateAvatarRequest
    Data transfer object for updating a user's avatar URL.
    UpdateDisplayNameRequest
    Data transfer object for updating a user's display name.
    UpdateEmailRequest
    Data transfer object for updating a user's email address.
    UserEnabledUpdateRequest
    Request body DTO for updating enabled/disabled status of a user.
